setup_required: Please enter both username and password
config_test_mode_desc: Messages are sent to the API but not delivered to handsets
config_gateway_enabled_desc: Enable or disable SMS sending globally
config_debug_desc: Log detailed request/response data (for troubleshooting only)
config_no_senders: No sender IDs available. Check your kwtSMS account.
config_no_coverage: No coverage data available. Try logging in again.
send_no_recipient: Please enter a recipient phone number
send_gateway_disabled: Gateway is disabled. Enable it in Settings.
send_not_configured: Gateway is not configured. Set up credentials in Settings.
send_test_mode_warning: Test mode is ON. Messages will NOT be delivered.
help_signup_text: Sign up for free at kwtsms.com to get API credentials.
help_setup_text: 1. Enter your API username and password above and click Login. 2. Select your sender ID and default country. 3. Enable the gateway and toggle test mode off when ready for production.
help_workflow_text: Create Zoho CRM workflow rules that call the kwtsms_send function to automate SMS on any CRM event (new lead, deal won, birthday, etc.).
help_dashboard_text: View message delivery status, logs, and analytics in your kwtSMS dashboard at kwtsms.com/account.
help_support_text: Contact kwtSMS support for help with your account, sender IDs, or delivery issues.
error_cooldown: Please wait 15 seconds before sending to this number again
error_queue_full: kwtSMS queue is full. Please try again later.
error_no_route: Country not supported. Check your kwtSMS coverage.
error_unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
error_sdk_timeout: Request timed out. Please try again.
error_sdk_permission: Permission denied. Contact your CRM administrator.
